company_context: CloudCheckr: Manage and optimize cloud for MSPs and enterprises Skip to main content Menu Search Search Book a demo CloudCheckr Understand and control cloud costs CloudCheckr enables MSPs and enterprises to better manage and reduce cloud costs, optimize resources and gain operational efficiencies, improve governance, and strengthen security and compliance. Now part of Flexera, CloudCheckr partners and customers can gain even more cloud insights and optimization through Flexera One FinOps and Cloud Cost Optimization. Request Demo Related Products/ Solutions Flexera One Cloud Cost Optimization Flexera One Cloud Commitment Management Flexera for MSPs Gain control and optimize cloud costs Previous Next Trustable data, precision insights Gain full visibility, improve optimization Get deep visibility into current and historical cloud spend. Know what cloud services and resources are in use, by whom–and how they are driving costs and consumption. Make informed decisions based on accurate data. Continually optimize cloud spend – by more than 30% –by identifying opportunities to rightsize and rebalance instances and act on purchase recommendations for commitment discounts. Reduce waste, improve efficiency Granular insights at speed and scale Track long-term resource consumption trends and identify opportunities to improve utilization and eliminate waste across your cloud estate. Quickly detect, investigate and respond to cost overruns. Empower MSP customer satisfaction and business growth through robust cloud management. All at scale, for the enterprise or MSPs. Automate cloud management Streamline operations, improve margins Large enterprises and MSPs can streamline cloud management with automation at every level. Hundreds of built-in recommendations, automated compliance benchmarking and self-healing for misconfigurations reduce manual effort for all. Automated invoicing, granular billing and white-label reporting further simplify complex MSP processes, freeing MSPs to focus on growth and customer value. Why CloudCheckr Comprehensive cloud management CloudCheckr empowers organizations to maximize cloud value, reduce costs and ensure governance across AWS and Azure environments. Key features include: Actionable visibility into spend and usage Automated cost optimization and waste elimination Security and compliance checks Customizable reporting and billing FinOps collaboration tools Image If you’re a managed service provider or a reseller, there’s simply nothing like CloudCheckr. CloudCheckr gives me the ability to customize pricing for each customer and make certain I’m accurately assigning the right costs to the right customers and cost centers... Customer satisfaction is much better now that our customers feel confident that they’re being billed accurately and on time.” Vincent Soerowintono, Solution Architect, inQdo Frequently asked questions What is cloud cost optimization? conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. I understand that CloudCheckr is a leader in cloud management and optimization for MSPs and enterprises. I'd like to introduce our data processing solution that can help you further optimize your cloud costs and improve operational efficiencies.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) Ah, another data processing solution. What makes yours so special? We already have a lot of tools in place, and I'm not sure we need another one.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns. However, our solution is designed to work in conjunction with existing tools, including cloud management platforms like yours. DeepData AI provides granular insights and automated recommendations that can help you identify areas of waste and optimization opportunities that may not be immediately apparent. We've seen our customers achieve significant cost savings, often in excess of 30%.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (still skeptical) That sounds too good to be true. How does it integrate with our existing systems, and what kind of resources would we need to dedicate to implementing and maintaining it?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our solution is designed to be lightweight and easy to integrate, with pre-built connectors for many popular cloud services and management platforms. We also offer a range of deployment options, including cloud-based and on-premises, to fit your specific needs. In terms of resources, we've found that our customers can typically get up and running with minimal IT support, and our automated recommendations and alerts help reduce the workload on your team.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (concerned about cost) I see. Well, what kind of pricing are we talking about? We're always looking for ways to optimize our costs, but we can't afford to break the bank on another tool.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand. Our pricing is tiered based on the size of your organization and the scope of your cloud estate. We offer a free trial and a pilot program to help you demonstrate the value of our solution before committing to a full rollout. We've found that our customers typically see a significant return on investment, often within the first few months of using our solution.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (considering) Alright, I'm willing to listen. But I've also been talking to some of your competitors, and I'm not sure what sets you apart from them.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: (confidently) That's a great question. While other solutions may offer some similar features, our AI-powered engine provides unparalleled insights and automation capabilities. We've also built a strong reputation for customer support and success, with a dedicated team that works closely with our customers to ensure they're getting the most out of our solution. I'd love the opportunity to show you a demo and discuss how DeepData AI can specifically address your needs and challenges.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo. I'm available next Wednesday or Thursday. Send over some times that work for you, and we'll make it happen.

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Competitors
Feedback: The seller could have more proactively addressed the buyer's concerns about competitors by providing specific examples or case studies that demonstrate DeepData AI's unique value proposition. Sentiment: Neutral
